name: Buttered Haricots Verts (Buttered Thin French Green Beans)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound haricots verts, thin french green beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot of boiling salted water, boil the haricots verts for 4 to 6 minutes, or until they are crisp-tender.
2. Drain the beans and plunge them into a bowl of ice and cold water to stop the cooking.
3. Drain the beans again and pat them dry.
- The beans may be prepared up to this point 1 day in advance and kept wrapped in dampened paper towels in a plastic bag and chilled.
4. Just before serving, melt the butter over moderately high heat in a large skillet.
5. In the skillet, toss the haricots verts until they are heated through.
6. Season the haricots verts with salt and pepper.
